title: Vinoc
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Dark Jedi |image=[[File:Vinoc.jpg]] |name=Vinoc |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]''[[Star Wars: The New Droid Army]]'' depicts an [[Coruscant Insurrection|attack]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], which means it must occur after "[[Heroes on Both Sides]]", as that episode represents the first time Coruscant has been attacked during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]., [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]]''[[Star Wars: The New Droid Army]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=[[Karoc]] |children=new |affiliation=*[[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]] *[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |masters=[[Dooku/Legends|Darth Tyranus]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Well, well. What have we here?''"
"''I think, my brother, this little Jedi plans to disrupt our modest operation.''"
"''That certainly won't do, will it, Vinoc?''"
"''I'm afraid you're right, Karoc. Not at all!|Vinoc and Karoc|}} '''Vinoc''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was one of [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was also the brother of [[Karoc]] and wielded a red-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. They were sent by Count Dooku to protect the [[C-B3 cortosis battle droid/Legends|cortosis droid]] factories on [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]]. He and his brother were confronted by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and a fierce duel was fought. They were ultimately defeated by the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. ==Powers and abilities== Vinoc fought in sync with his brother Karoc, circling Skywalker on Metalorn to box him in. His lightsaber style resembled a composite of [[Form III/Legends|Soresu]] and [[Form II/Legends|Makashi]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: The New Droid Army]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Dark Acolytes}} {{Interlang |sv=Vinoc }} [[Category:Dark Acolytes]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
